_note: Data-driven exercise library for the Sports at Home form-model engine. A figure is named joints (2-D coords in a 240x340 viewBox); a movement is keyframe poses the engine interpolates between, clocked by tempo. Object glyphs are referenced by id and drawn by web/js/formModel.js. Authored conservatively: only movements whose keyframes are verified are shipped. Extend by adding entries here — no engine change needed.

exercises.name: Chair sit-to-stand

cues.Down: Push hips back, sit slowly to the chair — control the lower.
cues.Stand: Breathe. Reset for the next rep.

staticCues: Sit tall on the front of a stable chair, feet flat, hands reaching forward.
Push hips back and stand by driving through your heels.
Stand fully upright, then lower slowly back to the chair under control.
Breathe out as you rise; never hold your breath.

exercises.name: Wall sit

cues.Settle: Slide down the wall until thighs are about parallel.
cues.Hold: Hold steady — keep breathing, don't hold your breath.
cues.Up: Slide back up the wall to stand.

staticCues: Stand with your back flat against a wall, feet a step forward.
Slide down until your knees are bent about 90 degrees (thighs parallel).
Hold the position and breathe normally throughout — do not hold your breath.
Slide back up to standing to finish.

exercises.name: Standing calf raise

cues.Up: Rise smoothly onto the balls of your feet.
cues.Hold: Pause at the top — tall and steady.
cues.Down: Lower your heels slowly under control.
cues.Reset: Light touch on a counter or wall if you need balance.

staticCues: Stand tall, feet hip-width, a counter or wall within reach for balance.
Rise onto the balls of your feet, lifting both heels.
Pause briefly at the top, then lower your heels slowly to the floor.
Hold support lightly if your balance is unsure.
